\caption{\textbf{Per-feature translation consistency $\mathrm{TC}(f, m)$ across the benchmark.} Each cell shows the number of tests successfully translated out of the total tests exercising that feature; a test is counted as successfully translated if at least one of five independent samples drawn at temperature~0.2 produces a correct, safe-Rust translation. Color: \textcolor[HTML]{0072B2}{\rule{0.7em}{0.7em}}~all tests pass to \textcolor[HTML]{D55E00}{\rule{0.7em}{0.7em}}~no tests pass.}
